Okay, here's what we covered in this module. We started out by talking about the elements of the ideal order form. Then we talked about the essence of good affirmation copy, how to get started with SAMCART and how to build your upsell sequences with SAMCART. Here's what to do now. Decide how you're going to accept orders, whether it's going to be a different platform or whether you're going to go ahead with SAMCART. If it's another platform, then design your order form using the five criteria that I gave you. If you are going to use SAMCART, then register for a SAMCART account. You get a special six-figure funnel formula customer-only discount, thanks to Brian's generosity. Then, again, if you are using SAMCART, set up your customer captivation offer inside of SAMCART following the instructions that Brian gave you in the last lesson.
